name: Miel Aux Trefles ( Cloverleaf Honey)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the white sugar until it has completely dissolved.
2. Add the wild roses and clover blossoms to the boiling sugar mixture.
3. Allow the mixture to stand for 30 minutes.
4. Bring the mixture back to a boil and simmer for an additional 3 minutes.
5. Strain the syrup through a cheesecloth or fine mesh strainer.
6. Let the syrup cool before using.
7. Pour the strained syrup into jars and store in a cool, dark place.
[source: A Taste of Acadie by Marie Cormier-Boudreau]
